scripts.dev: npm run build ; npm run start
scripts.build: rm -rf dist/ ; tsc ; npm run fix-files
scripts.fix-files: cp -v src/framework/package.json dist/framework ; mv dist/framework/src dist/framework/dist ; npm run symlink-sub-node-modules ; npm run copy-sub-symlinks
scripts.symlink-sub-node-modules: find src/subs -type d -name node_modules -exec bash -c 'ln -sv "$(dirname "$(echo "$1" | sed "s|[^/]*/|../|g")")/$1" "dist${1#src}"' _ {} \;
scripts.copy-sub-symlinks: find src/subs -type d -name node_modules -prune -o -type l -exec sh -c 'cp -Pv "$1" "dist${1#src}"' _ {} \;
